notes: Silent native-like media UI: remove noisy video processing labels and MAX-saved captions from file cards.
File attachments keep a private same-origin fallback download route while MAX payload is retained; no permanent /public/comment-uploads file link in UI.
Video upload prefers multipart to avoid base64 overhead, with JSON fallback only when needed.
Video transcode is tuned down to a lighter 540px MP4 for faster readiness in MAX WebView.
Photo comments remain lightweight preview-only and never sync full images to MAX.
